name: capital-edge-mcp-functions
description: Firebase Cloud Functions wrappers for the Capital Edge scrapers. Deployed via firebase deploy --only functions.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=lib/index.js --external:firebase-admin --external:firebase-functions --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
